issue_summary: CurrencyField's OpenExchangeRatesOrgProvider now requires a ratesFileLocation init param, since the previous global default no longer works
javadoc_before:
/** * Exchange Rates Provider for {@link CurrencyField} implementing the freely available * exchange rates from openexchangerates.org *

* Disclaimer: This data is collected from various providers and provided free of charge * for informational purposes only, with no guarantee whatsoever of accuracy, validity, * availability or fitness for any purpose; use at your own risk. Other than that - have * fun, and please share/watch/fork if you think data like this should be free! */
javadoc_after:
/** *

* Exchange Rates Provider for {@link CurrencyField} capable of fetching & * parsing the freely available exchange rates from openexchangerates.org *

*

* Configuration Options: *

*
    *
  • ratesFileLocation - A file path or absolute URL specifying the JSON data to load (mandatory)
    • *
  • - How frequently (in minutes) to reload the exchange rate data (default: 1440)
    • *
*

* Disclaimer: This data is collected from various providers and provided free of charge * for informational purposes only, with no guarantee whatsoever of accuracy, validity, * availability or fitness for any purpose; use at your own risk. Other than that - have * fun, and please share/watch/fork if you think data like this should be free! *

* @see openexchangerates.org JSON Data Format */
